seoTitle: How to Enable Dark Mode in Freshdesk
metaDescription: Learn how to switch Freshdesk into dark mode for a more comfortable viewing experience during long support shifts.
intro: Staring at a bright screen all day can strain your eyes, and dark mode offers a more comfortable alternative. This guide shows how to enable dark mode in Freshdesk.

steps.heading: Open your account settings
steps.body: Log in to Freshdesk and go to your personal preferences or display settings.

steps.heading: Find the appearance option
steps.body: Look for a setting related to theme or appearance within your preferences.

steps.heading: Switch to dark mode
steps.body: Toggle the setting from light to dark mode.

steps.heading: Confirm the change
steps.body: Save the setting and refresh if needed to see the interface switch to the darker theme.

faq.question: Is dark mode available for all Freshdesk users?
faq.answer: Dark mode availability can depend on your Freshdesk version and plan, so check your settings menu to confirm.

faq.question: Does dark mode affect what customers see?
faq.answer: No, dark mode is a personal display preference for agents and doesn't change the customer-facing portal.

faq.question: Can I switch back to light mode later?
faq.answer: Yes, you can toggle between light and dark mode at any time from the same settings area.

faq.question: Does dark mode change any functionality?
faq.answer: No, dark mode only changes the visual appearance, not how any features work.
